creator: bsam@ipt.ru
text:
One more error. This error occures at hosts that don't have kernel
sources:
-----
====================<phase 4: make build>====================
add_pkg
===>  Configuring for skystar2-10
===>  Building for skystar2-10
===> skystar2 (all)
"/usr/share/mk/bsd.kmod.mk", line 12: "can't find kernel source tree"
*** Error code 1

Stop in /work/a/ports/net/skystar2/work/skystar2_10.
*** Error code 1
-----
